title: hopea basilanica
intro: Hopea basilanica, also known as the Basilan ironwood or Bagtikan tree, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hopea basilanica are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, which can be made by infusing the leaves or bark in hot water or mixing them with other herbs to create a tincture or decoction.
